canonical_definition: A fast, sensitive protein search tool used as part of an analysis pipeline to efficiently identify homologous sequences in a database that are highly influential on a model's likelihood for a target protein.
papers: A new framework for evaluating model out-of-distribution generalisation for the biochemical domain

definitions.text: A computationally efficient similarity function for comparing protein sequences, used for partitioning datasets in protein property prediction tasks.
